hero.title: Scenario-based UI Design Configurator
hero.description: Preview design effects in real components, export Tailwind Config and AI prompts in one click.

configMatrix.title: 8-dim Config Matrix
configMatrix.description: From colors, shapes, spacing to typography, fully customize your design system with real-time preview.

dualPreview.title: Dual-Device Preview
dualPreview.description: Simultaneously preview on mobile and desktop to ensure design consistency across devices.

oneClickExport.title: One-Click Export
oneClickExport.description: Export Tailwind Config, CSS variables and AI prompts, seamlessly integrate into your development workflow.

placeholder.title: Placeholder Generator
placeholder.description: Quickly generate placeholder images with custom size, color, and style. Supports PNG/JPG/WebP/SVG formats.

scenes.title: 6 Scenarios
scenes.description: Covering e-commerce, dashboards, social media and more, 13+ templates ready to use.

urlShare.title: URL Sharing
urlShare.description: Share your design config via URL parameters for easy team collaboration.

step1.title: Choose Scene & Template
step1.description: Select from 6 scenarios that fit your business, then pick a starting template to customize.

step2.title: Real-time Preview & Tweak
step2.description: Adjust colors, shapes, spacing in the right panel, see instant results in the center preview area.

step3.title: Export Config
step3.description: Export Tailwind Config, CSS variables or AI prompts in one click, apply directly to your project.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.description: Try Style Forge now and build your design system quickly.
